_README: Client onboarding inputs, keyed by tenant slug. Fill from the onboarding Google Sheet. The script derives timezone, branding palette, business hours, SEO copy and addresses from these fields. 'branding' accepts a color-name string ('Black', 'Blue, White, Gold'), an array of hex codes ['#111','#fff','#d4af37'], or 'default'/'none' for a professional default. Run: node scripts/tenant-onboarding.mjs <slug>
